    Construct a request, send it to the active API, and store the response for retrieval.

    Reset all values so we can make a new request.

    Send the request with retry support, store the response, then reset state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Request

      public Request()

  • Method Details

    • addParameter

      public void addParameter(String parameter, String value)
      Set a parameter and its value for a request. They will show up as part of the query string in the API request.
      Parameters:
      parameter - String the parameter being passed
      value - String the value to be passed

    • buildURI

      protected org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpRequestBase buildURI()
      Returns a URI that includes any parameters if it is set. Otherwise it returns the existing URI.
      Returns:
      HttpRequestBase the new request object

    • setHeaders

      protected void setHeaders()

    • addHeader

      public void addHeader(String name, String value)
      Set a header and its value for a request.
      Parameters:
      name - String the name being passed
      value - String the value to be passed

    • setBasicAuth

      public void setBasicAuth(String username, String password)
      Sets the Authorization header to Basic authentication using the given credentials.
      Parameters:
      username - String the username
      password - String the password

    • setBearerToken

      public void setBearerToken(String token)
      Sets the Authorization header to Bearer token authentication.
      Parameters:
      token - String the bearer token value

    • setApiKeyHeader

      public void setApiKeyHeader(String key, String value)
      Sets an arbitrary API key header.
      Parameters:
      key - String the header name (e.g., "X-API-Key")
      value - String the header value

    • setRetry

      public void setRetry(int maxRetries, long delayMs)
      Sets the retry policy for subsequent requests.
      Parameters:
      maxRetries - int the maximum number of retry attempts (0 = no retries)
      delayMs - long the delay in milliseconds between retries

    • setTrustAllSsl

      public void setTrustAllSsl()
      Configures the HTTP client to trust all SSL certificates, including self-signed ones. Use only in test environments.

    • addCookie

      public void addCookie(String name, String value)
      Adds a cookie to be sent with the next request.
      Parameters:
      name - String the cookie name
      value - String the cookie value

    • toCurlCommand

      public String toCurlCommand()
      Builds a curl command string representing the current request state. Must be called after buildURI() and setHeaders() have been applied.
      Returns:
      String the curl command, or an empty string if no request has been initialized

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)
      Creates a StringEntity to hold the json body.
      Parameters:
      body - String the JSON to encode.

    • setMultipartFormDataBody

      public void setMultipartFormDataBody(String nameOfInput, String boundary, InputStream inputStream, String filename)
      Sets the body to a multipart/form-data body, using the given name, boundary, input stream, and filename. Also sets a header with the Content-Type set to 'multipart/form-data' and specifies the boundary string passed to this method.
      Parameters:
      nameOfInput - String name of the multipart segment.
      boundary - String the multipart boundary.
      inputStream - InputStream input stream of the file to upload.
      filename - String name of the file being uploaded.

    • createAndSendRequest

      public void createAndSendRequest(RequestType type, String endpoint)
      Construct a request, send it to the active API, and store the response for retrieval.
      Parameters:
      type - io.github.sentinel.enums.RequestType the type of request to send
      endpoint - the endpoint to send the request

    • sendRequest

      protected void sendRequest()
      Send the request with retry support, store the response, then reset state.

    • buildHttpClient

      private org.apache.http.impl.client.CloseableHttpClient buildHttpClient()

    • buildCookieStore

      private org.apache.http.impl.client.BasicCookieStore buildCookieStore()

    • reset

      protected void reset()
      Reset all values so we can make a new request.
